name: /pr-source-add rejects an org/repo argument that does not match the org-slash-repo format
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-source-add.sh" not-a-valid-format --tier 2 --source-class financial-industry 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_format' err.txt && grep -q 'expected: <org>/<repo>' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
